title: OAS Capability Manifest v1
description: External model capability overrides for the OAS agent SDK. Load with OAS_CAPABILITY_MANIFEST=path/to/manifest.json.

models.description: Ordered list of model entries. Earlier entries take priority.

model_entry.description: Capability overrides for models whose ID starts with id_prefix (case-insensitive prefix match). All fields except id_prefix are optional.

id_prefix.description: Case-insensitive prefix matched against the model ID. E.g. 'my-llama-q4' matches 'my-llama-q4-k4' and 'my-llama-q4-k8'.

base.description: Provider preset to use as a starting point before applying overrides. One of: 'openai_chat', 'openai_chat_extended', 'anthropic', 'gemini', 'ollama', 'glm', 'kimi', 'nemotron'. Defaults to OAS default_capabilities if absent or unrecognised.

max_context_tokens.description: Maximum context window size in tokens. Overrides the base preset value.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens. Overrides the base preset value.

supports_tools.description: Whether the model supports tool/function calling.

supports_tool_choice.description: Whether the model supports tool_choice (forced tool selection).

supports_parallel_tool_calls.description: Whether the model can call multiple tools in a single turn.

supports_reasoning.description: Whether the model has any reasoning/thinking capability (union flag).

supports_extended_thinking.description: Whether the model supports budget_tokens-controlled extended thinking.

supports_reasoning_budget.description: Whether the model supports reasoning budget control (budget_tokens, reasoning_effort, etc.).

supports_response_format_json.description: Whether the model supports JSON output mode (syntactically valid JSON, no schema guarantee).

supports_structured_output.description: Whether the model supports provider-native schema-constrained output.

supports_multimodal_inputs.description: Union flag: true if the model accepts any non-text input modality.

supports_image_input.description: Whether the model accepts image inputs.

supports_audio_input.description: Whether the model accepts audio inputs (native tokens, not transcription).

supports_video_input.description: Whether the model accepts video inputs.

supports_native_streaming.description: Whether the model/provider supports server-sent event streaming.

supports_system_prompt.description: Whether the model supports a system prompt. Set to false for models that require folding system content into the first user message.

supports_caching.description: Whether the provider supports prompt caching (reduces cost on repeated prefixes).

supports_prompt_caching.description: Whether prompt caching uses explicit cache breakpoints (e.g. Anthropic cache_control).

supports_top_k.description: Whether the model accepts top_k sampling parameter.

supports_min_p.description: Whether the model accepts min_p sampling parameter.

supports_seed.description: Whether the model accepts a seed for deterministic sampling.

supports_computer_use.description: Whether the model supports computer-use tool category.

supports_code_execution.description: Whether the model supports server-side code execution (sandbox).
